---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to make Boomi Xcel even better
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: mitchelljfranklin
---

**Which Boomi page would this affect?**
e.g. Build canvas, Process Reporting, Dashboard, Options page

**What are you trying to do?**
Describe the workflow friction and what the feature would solve.

**How do you do it today?**
Describe the current workaround (if any).

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

**Relevant page URL structure**
e.g. `/ProcessReporting`, `/AtomSphere.html#build`

**Optional: DOM snippet**
Share the HTML of the area where the feature would interact — this dramatically speeds up development.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, or anything else that helps explain your idea.
